sqlMap.select: select * from CoverageModifiers where ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into CoverageModifiers(CoverageSequence, TransactionSequence, ModifierKey, PolicyKey Percentage Comment LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#CoverageSequence:NUMERIC#, #TransactionSequence:NUMERIC#, #ModifierKey:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #Percentage# #Comment# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select Percentage, Comment, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CoverageSequence, TransactionSequence, ModifierKey, PolicyKey from CoverageModifiers where CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update CoverageModifiers set
Percentage = #Percentage# Percentage = null Comment = #Comment# Comment = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from CoverageModifiers where CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from CoverageModifiers where ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select Percentage, Comment, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CoverageSequence, TransactionSequence, ModifierKey, PolicyKey from CoverageModifiers where CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select CoverageSequence, TransactionSequence, ModifierKey, PolicyKey, Percentage, Comment, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from CoverageModifiers where ModifierKey = #ModifierKey# and CoverageSequence = #CoverageSequence# and TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
